name: bidnsteal-server
description: Backend services and infra for BIDNSTEAL

scripts.dev:worker: npm run ensure:env && npm run redis:start && npm --workspace @hotwheels/worker run dev
scripts.build: npm --workspace @hotwheels/shared run build && npm --workspace @hotwheels/worker run build
scripts.start:worker: npm run ensure:env && npm --workspace @hotwheels/worker run start
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @hotwheels/shared run typecheck && npm --workspace @hotwheels/worker run typecheck
